title: 小さな魔女と英雄の出会い

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Here to return that? Thank you very much.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
(I'm seeing a lot more students take an interest in
that book. I wonder if I could get along with any
of them...)

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
(But maybe I'll just startle them and we won't end
up clicking. Ngh...)

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hello? I said, hellooo! I want to check out that book you've got there!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Oh, yes, of course! Just give me one second!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: (Huh, this is The Complete Guide to Magic. Maybe she's into fantasy too...)

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hm? Why are you staring at me?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Oh! ♪ Do you want to become a witch too?!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. ♪ Then that makes you my rival! See, the
name's Magical Girl Sweepy, and my dream is to
become a witch!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Casting spells will be a piece of cake once I'm a
witch! I could make an empty field bloom with
pretty flowers, draw a rainbow in the sky, or even
make it rain!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
With magic, you can create whatever wonder
comes to mind! ♪

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
(She's so bold about her dream... even though it's
uncertain whether magic is even real.)

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
(Yet, she talks about it with such passion and
confidence.)

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: (Maybe I can too...)

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
So, how about it? You wanna become a witch or
not?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Well, I...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I'm Zenno Rob Roy! My dream is to one day
become a hero like the historical Rob Roy!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: ...A hero?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: (Oh no... I was better off keeping quiet...)

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Then that makes us allies!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Cause witches and warriors make for the
strongest combination! ♪ I trust you to keep our
enemies at bay!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh, yes, you can count on me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Later on...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Nooo, I can't get any more tree branches! If
you're a true hero, you'll help me, Rob Roy!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Yes, I'll help right away! ...Hehe.
